title: Wawa - Stroud Township, PA - PH&C
excerpt: We continue our assistance in developing Wawa stores, and our newest opened in April 2025. contentHtml:
We continue our assistance in developing Wawa stores, and our newest opened in April 2025. Our work for a developer on their first ever Wawa store included delivering a pad site to the Wawa Corporation specifications, and working with their General Contractor to successfully complete the construction.

Our focus was on controlling costs and managing a budget while working with architects, engineering firms, numerous government agencies, utilities and contractors, from geotechnical and underground investigations thru various construction segments. 

Key Features:

  • 6,049 SF food market with 16 fuel stations
  • Rock hammering and blasting
  • 12,000 SF underground storm-water detention basins 
  • 1 above ground storm-water detention pond
  • 5000 SF Redi-Rock Retaining Wall
  • Individual NPDES Permit
  • Extensive PennDOT & City access & signal improvements.

CLICK HERE to see more info on this store
